---
title: "Eurobarometer Analysis"
format: html
---

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false
# Load core libraries for data manipulation, import, and modeling
library(tidyverse) # Data wrangling + visualization (dplyr, ggplot2, etc.)
library(haven) # Import Stata (.dta) files
library(broom) # Convert model outputs into tidy data frames
library(modelsummary) # Create clean regression tables
```

# Load the data

```{r}
# Read Eurobarometer dataset (Stata format)
# This dataset contains survey responses across countries and years
eb_data <- read_dta("eurobarometer_trends.dta")
```

# Inspect the data structure

```{r}
# View structure of dataset:
# - Variable names
# - Data types (numeric, factor, etc.)
# - Sample values
glimpse(eb_data)
```

```{r}
# Check dataset dimensions:
# - Number of rows (observations)
# - Number of columns (variables)
dim(eb_data)
```

```{r}
# Summary statistics:
# - Distribution of numeric variables
# - Factor levels / categorical breakdowns
# Useful for identifying missing values or anomalies
summary(eb_data)
```
